sections.title: Phrasal verbs
items: **put up** — put something on a wall (eg, a picture)

exercises.title: Topic vocabulary (gap fill)
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences with words from the box.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete the sentences with words from the box.

items.sentence: The weather ...... says there will be strong winds tomorrow.
Our school teaches students to ...... bottles and cans.
We must ...... forests for future generations.
The island has a warm ...... all year.
Many people stayed indoors during the summer ...... .
A tiny ...... landed on my hand.
We saw bright ...... during the storm.
My grandparents live in the ......, far from the city.

exercises.title: Circle the correct word
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct option in each sentence.
exercises.studentInstruction: Choose the correct option in each sentence.

items.sentenceBefore: Mars is a ...... in our solar system.
items.originalSentence: Mars is a ...... in our solar system. **planet / satellite**
items.completedSentence: Mars is a ...... in our solar system. planet

items.sentenceBefore: The lake was almost ...... after the very cold night.
items.originalSentence: The lake was almost ...... after the very cold night. **local / freezing**
items.completedSentence: The lake was almost ...... after the very cold night. freezing

items.sentenceBefore: Volunteers helped to ...... the injured bird.
items.originalSentence: Volunteers helped to ...... the injured bird. **name / rescue**
items.completedSentence: Volunteers helped to ...... the injured bird. rescue

items.sentenceBefore: A dolphin is a ...... because it feeds its babies milk.
items.originalSentence: A dolphin is a ...... because it feeds its babies milk. **mammal / reptile**
items.completedSentence: A dolphin is a ...... because it feeds its babies milk. mammal

items.sentenceBefore: The stars looked ...... through the telescope.
items.originalSentence: The stars looked ...... through the telescope. **amazing / global**
items.completedSentence: The stars looked ...... through the telescope. amazing

exercises.title: Phrasal verbs (complete the gaps)
exercises.instructions: Write the correct phrasal verb in each gap.
exercises.studentInstruction: Write the correct phrasal verb in each gap.

items.sentence: Please ...... that box and come here.
The sky is dark now, but it should ...... later.
The fence is there to ...... people from the protected beach.
They used water to ...... the campfire.
We decided to ...... a map of the solar system in class.
The fire will ...... if there is no more wood.
Rubbish can ...... quickly if nobody clears it away.
The old gas tank could ...... if it gets too hot.

exercises.title: Prepositional phrases
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with a phrase from the list.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete each sentence with a phrase from the list.

items.sentence: We could hear thunder ......, but the storm was far away.
......, the project seemed difficult.
There were fifty trees planted ...... .
The cat was sitting ...... the garden wall.
There is snow ...... the mountain.
items.explanation: Highest point → **at the top of** the mountain.

items.sentence: The walk will take an hour ...... .

exercises.title: Word patterns
exercises.instructions: Write one word in each gap.
exercises.studentInstruction: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: My little sister is afraid ...... storms.
Are you aware ...... the damage caused by plastic?
He is enthusiastic ...... protecting wildlife.
The council is serious ...... recycling more waste.
The campsite was short ...... food after the storm.
The glass wall prevents insects ...... entering the house.
The rescue team saved the dog ...... the flood.
Parents often worry ...... air pollution near schools.
Scientists noticed an increase ...... ocean temperatures.
The earthquake did damage ...... the old bridge.

exercises.title: Word formation
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct form of the word in capitals.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete each sentence with the correct form of the word in capitals.

items.sentence: The park is in a ...... area of the town. (CENTRE)
The moon looked almost ...... last night. (CIRCLE)
Some wild animals can be ...... if you get too close. (DANGER)
The ...... of the ocean is difficult to measure. (DEEP)
items.explanation: Noun from DEEP → **depth** of the ocean.

items.sentence: The forest fire caused terrible ...... . (DESTROY)
It was so ...... that we couldn't see the road. (FOG)
The ...... planted new flowers in the park. (GARDEN)
The island suffered an ...... of insects last summer. (INVADE)
It is ...... for leaves to change colour in autumn. (NATURE)
Air ...... is worse in large cities. (POLLUTE)

exercises.title: G: Gap fill
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with a word or phrase from the box.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete each sentence with a word or phrase from the box.

items.sentence: Animals and birds living freely in nature are called ...... .
People who throw rubbish on the beach ...... .
A lizard is a type of ...... .
Earth, Mars and Jupiter are part of the ...... .
When a candle ......, the room becomes dark.
We got wet during a short rain ...... .

exercises.title: Mixed revision
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with one suitable word.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete each sentence with one suitable word.

items.sentence: Never leave ...... near a river or beach.
At the ...... of the sea, there are many strange creatures.
Some rare birds could become ...... without protection.
The weather was ......, so we had lunch outside.
Can scientists ...... the satellite in space?
The children heard ...... before the heavy rain started.
More people are aware ...... the need to save water.
items.explanation: Aware **of** the need to save water.

items.sentence: Please keep ...... the field because animals are nesting there.
items.explanation: Stay away → keep **out** of the field.

exercises.title: Vocabulary in context
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with a word from the box.
exercises.studentInstruction: Complete each sentence with a word from the box.

items.sentence: A bat is a ......, although it can fly.
Firefighters worked hard to ...... people after the flood.
The water was ......, so nobody wanted to swim.
The ...... shook the ground for several seconds.
This bird may become ...... if its forest home disappears.
A weather ...... can help scientists study storms.
Plastic ...... is dangerous for sea animals.
Venus is the hottest ...... in the solar system.
Many horses still live ...... in some parts of the world.
A dry ...... makes it difficult for some plants to grow.
